creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please stop making stuff up and show where it is documented that PORTS must be tested with all CPUTYPES or even that CPUTYPE is supported.

The lack of documentation against support isn't proof it is supported.


You can refuse to use poudriere all you want, but it's the pass/fail of ports building.   You aren't going to convince anyone, no matter how many insults you though out.

Interesting that you are incapable of talking without stooping to using names and insults though.
